description:
Free DICOM viewer for primary processing and preservation of medical images in DICOM format.

Most of the available commercial software for manipulation of DICOM images is expensive by itself or distributed with expensive medical machinery. Free software packages on the other side are often non-intuitive and with limited functionality. There is a common situation for the user when more than one package is needed to achieve feasible results.
The subject of the presented work is the design and implementation of a software package aimed to overcome the problem stated above. MicroDicom DICOM Viewer is equipped with most common tools for manipulation of DICOM images, and it has an intuitive user interface. It also has the advantage of being free for use and accessible to everyone.
Features:
- Open and save medical images in DICOM format
- Read DICOM files of any manufacturer and modality
- Supported DICOM images - without compression and RLE, JPEG Lossy, JPEG Lossless, JPEG 2000 Lossy, JPEG2000 Lossless compressions
- Structured Reports
- MPEG-2 and MPEG-4 transfer syntaxes
- Encapsulated PDF
- Open DICOM directory files
- Display patient list from DICOMDIR
- Load via drag & drop or double-click
- Open images in common graphic formats (JPEG, BMP, PNG, GIF, TIFF)
- Convert DICOM images to JPEG, BMP, PNG, GIF, TIFF
- Convert DICOM images to movie file format(AVI, WMV and MP4)
- Copy DICOM image to clipboard
- Anonymize DICOM images
- Image orientation in overlay
- Mouse-driven level-window, user-defined window presets
- Zooming and panning
- Medical image processing operation
- Measurements and annotations
- Brightness/contrast control
- Image resize, Rotate, Flip, Invert
- Displaying DICOM attributes of selected image
- Suited for patient CD/DVD to show DICOM images without installation
- Run on Windows Vista, Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10 and Windows 11
- Available for x86 and x64 platforms
- Portable version
- And much more
- New features:
  Added Spine labeling tool with ability to propagate labels to all images in the study.
  Added 3D cursor tool and icon, with toolbar update for 3D tools.
  Added Preview Tab with thumbnails in the DICOM browser pane.
  Added ability to drag image from the Preview tab to the view.
  Added ability to export monochrome DICOM images.
  Added Preloaded images option when opening a series to the toolbar and menu.
  Added setting for preloading all images in a series.
  Added Status column on the studies list in the Database.
  Added load and save annotations to/from JSON file and current database.
  Improved Preview tab to show images downloaded from a PACS.
  Improved Preview tab: made it the default tab, added thumbnail view, context menu support, Ctrl+click support, search text support, text placeholder when empty, and PDF/VIDEO/SR thumbnail display.
  Improved SR document viewing in Split View.
  Improved zoom tool.
  Improved arrow tool.
  Improved DICOM Browser: made the DICOM Browser pane and DICOM tags pane wider by default, enabled Delete key support, and fixed shortcuts conflict with edit box typing.
  Turn off synchronization while holding the Alt key.
  Performance improvement
  Added DICOM Conformance Statement.
- Defect fixing:
  Fixed a crash in the Preview tab.
  Fixed a crash when refreshing a document.
  Fixed a crash when loading multiframe images.
  Fixed several other crashes and potential crashes.
  Fixed a regression.
  Fixed an issue with multiframe images and image size.
  Fixed an issue where a filter applied on a multiframe image was applied only on the first frame.
  Fixed an issue with exporting inverted images.
  Fixed an issue with the Preview tab and multiframe images.
  Fixed an issue where selecting an SR in Split View did not make the item visible in the DICOM Browser.
